title: AI-assisted invoice approval and refund workflow
summary: A new AI agent reviews invoices, recommends refund approvals, and syncs payment state to the ERP. The release touches authentication, billing, webhook sync, and dashboard review screens.
business_context: Finance wants to reduce manual refund review time without losing release control. The risky part is that an AI agent can recommend refunds and downstream systems update automatically unless a human approval gate catches high-risk cases.
diff_excerpt: Adds ai_agent_recommend_refund(), updates admin role checks, sends refund webhook events to ERP, and changes dashboard state from pending_review to auto_recommended. TODO: verify webhook replay handling and human approval requirement for high value refunds.
